evidence.text: oke tests for JavaScript SDK development ## Quickstart Install the main SDK and autoeval scorers: ```bash npm install braintrust autoevals ``` Create `tutorial.eval.ts`: ```ts import { Eval } from "braintrust"; import { LevenshteinScorer } from "autoevals"; Eval("Say Hi Bot", { data: () => [ { input: "Foo", expected: "Hi Foo" }, { input: "Bar", expected: "Hello Bar" }, ], task: (input) => "Hi " + input, scores: [LevenshteinScorer], }); ``` Run it: ```bash BRAINTRUST_API_KEY= npx braintrust eval tutorial.eval.ts ``` ## Packages | Package | Purpose | npm | Docs | | --------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------
